search.query: | tstats count where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (TERM(src_ip=$src_ip$) OR TERM(src_host=$src_ip$)) $advanced_filter$ (TERM(dest_ip=$dest_ip$) OR TERM(dest_host=$dest_ip$)) TERM(src_port=$src_port$) TERM(dest_port=$dest_port$) direction="inbound" threat_list_name="*" by _time PREFIX(exp_ip=) protocol_ts nfo_hostname $span_token$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol_ts OUTPUT transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | stats sum(count) | appendpipe [stats count | where count=0]

| tstats count where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (TERM(src_ip=$src_ip$) OR TERM(src_host=$src_ip$)) $advanced_filter$ (TERM(dest_ip=$dest_ip$) OR TERM(dest_host=$dest_ip$)) TERM(src_port=$src_port$) TERM(dest_port=$dest_port$) direction="outbound" threat_list_name="*" by _time PREFIX(exp_ip=) protocol_ts nfo_hostname $span_token$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol_ts OUTPUT transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | stats sum(count) | appendpipe [stats count | where count=0]

| tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (TERM(src_ip=$src_ip$) OR TERM(src_host=$src_ip$)) $advanced_filter$ (TERM(dest_ip=$dest_ip$) OR TERM(dest_host=$dest_ip$)) TERM(src_port=$src_port$) TERM(dest_port=$dest_port$) threat_list_name="*" by _time PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) PREFIX(dest_port=) nfo_hostname protocol_ts direction $span_token$ | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | rename dest_port= as dest_port | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol_ts OUTPUT transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `dedup_timechart_ts` | eval sum_bytes = sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out | eval summbits= sum_bytes*8/($span_int$*1000000) | timechart limit=10 $span_token$ sum(summbits) by direction useother="f"

| tstats count where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (TERM(src_ip=$src_ip$) OR TERM(src_host=$src_ip$)) $advanced_filter$ (TERM(dest_ip=$dest_ip$) OR TERM(dest_host=$dest_ip$)) TERM(src_port=$src_port$) TERM(dest_port=$dest_port$) threat_list_name="*" by PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) protocol_ts nfo_hostname direction reputation | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol_ts OUTPUT transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval ip=if(direction="inbound",src_ip,dest_ip) | eval attacker = ip . " - " . reputation . " (". direction . ")" | iplocation ip | geostats sum(count) by attacker

| tstats sum(PREFIX(bytes_in=)) as sum_bytes_in sum(PREFIX(bytes_out=)) as sum_bytes_out sum(PREFIX(packets_in=)) as sum_packets_in sum(PREFIX(packets_out=)) as sum_packets_out sum(PREFIX(flow_count=)) as sum_flow_count avg(PREFIX(duration=)) as avg_duration where `netflow_search_rule_20062` TERM(exp_ip=$exp_ip$) nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" (TERM(src_ip=$src_ip$) OR TERM(src_host=$src_ip$)) $advanced_filter$ (TERM(dest_ip=$dest_ip$) OR TERM(dest_host=$dest_ip$)) TERM(src_port=$src_port$) TERM(dest_port=$dest_port$) threat_list_name="*" by PREFIX(exp_ip=) PREFIX(src_ip=) PREFIX(src_host=) PREFIX(src_port=) PREFIX(dest_ip=) PREFIX(dest_host=) PREFIX(dest_port=) protocol_ts nfo_hostname direction reputation threat_list_name | rename exp_ip= as exp_ip | rename src_ip= as src_ip | rename src_host= as src_host | rename src_port= as src_port | rename dest_ip= as dest_ip | rename dest_host= as dest_host | rename dest_port= as dest_port | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" | lookup `is_local_lookup` ta_netflow_protocol_lookup protocol_id as protocol_ts OUTPUT transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | eval attacker_ip = if(direction=="inbound",src_ip,dest_ip) | eval attacker_host = if(direction=="inbound",src_host,dest_host) | eval attacker_port = if(direction=="inbound",src_port,dest_port) | eval victim_ip = if(direction=="outbound",src_ip,dest_ip) | eval victim_host = if(direction=="outbound",src_host,dest_host) | eval victim_port = if(direction=="outbound",src_port,dest_port) | eval sum_bytes = sum_bytes_in + sum_bytes_out | eval sum_packets = sum_packets_in + sum_packets_out | stats sum(sum_bytes) as sum_bytes sum(sum_packets) as sum_packets sum(sum_flow_count) as "Flow Count" avg(avg_duration) as avg_duration by nfo_hostname exp_ip attacker_ip attacker_port attacker_host victim_ip victim_port victim_host threat_list_name reputation transport | eval megabytes = sum_bytes/1024/1024 | sort 0 by - megabytes | `commas_formatting(Total Traffic MB, megabytes,2)` | `commas_formatting(Total Packets, sum_packets)` | `commas_formatting(Avg Duration, avg_duration,2)` | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name attacker_ip attacker_host attacker_port victim_ip victim_host victim_port threat_list_name reputation transport "Total Traffic MB" "Total Packets" "Flow Count" "Avg Duration" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename transport as "Protocol" | rename attacker_ip as "Attacker IP" | rename attacker_port as "Attacker port" | rename attacker_host as "Attacker host" | rename victim_ip as "Victim IP" | rename victim_port as "Victim port" | rename victim_host as "Victim host" | rename threat_list_name as "Threat List" | rename reputation as "Reputation"

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module “10062: Network Conversations” (syslogs with nfc_id=20062). This Module identifies and reports hosts with the most traffic (optionally all hosts). It consolidates NetFlow records over a period of time (Data Collection Interval) which all have the same combination of the following fields: Source IP address, Destination IP address, Source port number, Destination port number, Layer 3 protocol. For bidirectional flows the Module stitches request-reply flows inverting source and destination for flows in the opposite direction. It reports consolidated flows separating bytes/packets sent and bytes/packets received.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
